backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a luxury e-commerce backend with product management (CRUD, filtering, sorting), review submission, newsletter subscription, and blob storage mixin integration.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented frontend features (luxury theme, navigation, hero section, collections, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Maison Élite luxury fashion SPA, loading Google Fonts preconnect and mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Collections, Product Detail, Wishlist, About, Contact, Privacy, and Terms pages, wrapped in a shared Layout with Header, Footer, and CartDrawer.
frontend/src/components/BrandStory.tsx: Brand story section component displaying a craftsmanship image with a decorative frame alongside heritage copy and key stats (years, handcrafted percentage, artisan count), with scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/CartDrawer.tsx: Slide-in cart drawer component showing selected items with quantity controls, remove buttons, subtotal, and a mock checkout flow that clears the cart on completion.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedCollecti: Displays a 4-item grid of curated product collections (Handbags, Purses, New Arrivals, Best Sellers) with images and fade-in animations, navigating to filtered collection pages on click.
frontend/src/components/FilterControls.t: Renders filter UI for the collections page with category buttons, sort dropdown, color dropdown, and popularity toggle buttons, calling onChange with updated filter state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, social media icons, quick navigation links, customer care links, and atelier address, styled in a dark luxury theme.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, wishlist and cart icon badges, and a mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background lifestyle image, animated headline, and CTA buttons linking to the collections and about pages.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Product image gallery with a zoomable main image (mouse-position-based zoom on hover) and clickable thumbnail strip for multi-image products.
frontend/src/components/Newsletter.tsx: Email newsletter signup section that submits via a mutation hook, handles already-subscribed errors, and shows a success confirmation with a 15% off offer.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product card with image, badges, wishlist toggle, and optional quick-add-to-cart button, navigating to the product detail page on click.
Displays a grid of up to 6 featured products fetched from the backend (falling back to placeholders), with loading skeletons and a 'View All Pieces' navigation button.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Shows a list of product reviews and provides an interactive form for submitting new reviews with a star rating, calling the backend mutation and updating local state on success.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a static grid of four hardcoded customer testimonials with star ratings, animated on scroll via an intersection observer.
frontend/src/components/TrustBadges.tsx: Displays three trust-signal badges (Secure Checkout, Free Shipping, Quality Guarantee) with icons, animated on scroll via an intersection observer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Manages a shopping cart stored in localStorage using a module-level shared state with listener-based reactivity, exposing add, remove, update, and clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, identity persistence, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all products, fetching a product by ID, subscribing an email, submitting a review, and adding a product via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Implements a shared wishlist state persisted to localStorage, exposing hooks to add, remove, toggle, and check products across components via a global listener pattern.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Playfair Display and Raleway fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, luxury CSS custom properties (gold, noir, beige, ivory), and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/lib/products.ts: Exports a static array of six placeholder Product objects used when the backend returns no data, plus a formatPrice utility for USD currency formatting.
frontend/src/lib/useIntersectionObserver: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set an isVisible flag once a referenced element enters the viewport, then disconnects the observer.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About/brand story page with a hero image, animated brand narrative text using the intersection observer, and a Newsletter section.
frontend/src/pages/CollectionsPage.tsx: Displays the full product catalog with client-side filtering by category, color, popularity, and sort order, falling back to placeholder products when the backend returns none.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Simple contact form page with name, email, and message fields that shows a thank-you confirmation on submission.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the home page by rendering Hero, FeaturedCollections, TrustBadges, ProductShowcase, BrandStory, Testimonials, and Newsletter sections in order.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Renders a full product detail page with an image gallery, color selector, quantity picker, add-to-cart/wishlist buttons, accordion info sections, and a reviews section. Falls back to placeholder product data while the backend query is loading.
frontend/src/pages/WishlistPage.tsx: Displays the user's saved wishlist items in a responsive grid with options to remove items or add them directly to the cart. Shows an empty-state prompt with a link to collections when no items are saved.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the luxury brand design system including custom fonts (Playfair Display, Raleway), brand color tokens (beige, ivory, gold, noir), shadow utilities, and animation keyframes, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for a luxury women's fashion e-commerce site, including architectural notes, required image assets, known issues, and a registry of implemented features.
